response: Imagine you’re holding a standard British three-pin plug with its distinctive yellow insulation. You’re about to plug it into one of three different wall sockets: one with two round pins, another with two flat pins, or the third with the usual three rectangular pins. Which socket will safely accept your plug?

meta.system: Reword this puzzle in a different natural style, SAME facts, SAME question. Reply ONLY the reworded text.
meta.user: You have a yellow UK plug. Put it into one of these wall sockets: the round-pin socket, the flat-pin socket, or the three-pin socket. Which one?
